shortDescription: "o==p compares the objects referred to by variables o and p"

    relation: Dual
  - id: AssignmentCopiesObject

The equality operator `==` compares two objects' values,
for example producing `true` if they contain the same values for every field.

frontmatter.shortDescription: o==p compares the objects referred to by variables o and p
frontmatter.shortCorrection: o==p compares the references stored in the variables o and p
